infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: HalauHub uses the camera to capture photos inside the app before you publish them.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: HalauHub accesses your photo library to let you choose videos that appear in the app.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: HalauHub saves edited photos to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSDocumentsFolderUsageDescription: HalauHub accesses your files so you can attach documents and waivers.
